data.title: Innovative Industrial Properties Declares First Quarter 2026 Dividends
data.description: In San Diego, Innovative Industrial Properties, Inc. (NYSE: IIPR) has declared a first quarter 2026 dividend of $1.90 per share for common stock, making it an annualized dividend of $7.60 per common share. The company, founded in 2016, has paid a total of $1.1 billion in common stock dividends to its shareholders. Moreover, the board of directors has also announced a regular quarterly dividend.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin cuts ties with nonprofit backed by SHIB donation due to strategic changes post $1B gift.
data.description: Following his donation of 50 trillion SHIB tokens in 2021, Vitalik Buterin has announced that he is no longer closely associated with the Future of Life Institute due to a shift in their strategy.

data.title: HBAR price may reach $0.116 by April 2026 with resistance at $0.10 and support at $0.09. RSI at 49.87.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Hedera (HBAR) is currently facing a crucial resistance level at $0.10, with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) standing at 49.87. Analysts are predicting a target price of $0.116 within the next 30 days, although the bearish Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) momentum indicates a possible downside to the $0.09 support level.

data.title: RLX Technology Announces Unaudited Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: On March 13, 2026, RLX Technology Inc. shared its unaudited financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025. As a prominent global e-vapor brand, RLX Technology is listed on the NYSE under the symbol RLX. The details of the fourth quarter's financial performance were disclosed on this day.

data.title: WIF price set to hit $0.18 by March, currently trading at $0.17. Oversold RSI at 35.22, with potential breakout. Range forecasted: $0.16-$0.20.
data.description: The cryptocurrency dogwifhat (WIF) is currently being traded at $0.17 and is indicating an oversold Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 35.22. There is potential for a breakout to $0.18. Technical analysis indicates that the trading range could be between $0.16 and $0.20 in the near future.

data.title: Sweden is investigating a reported leak of e-government platform source code by CGI Sverige after hackers revealed it.
data.description: Sweden is currently probing a possible leak associated with CGI Sverige following claims by hackers that they have disclosed the source code of the nation’s e-government platform.

data.title: Alibaba invests in MetaComp's $35M fundraise to boost StableX Network expansion.
data.description: MetaComp has successfully closed their Pre-A+ funding round with the support of Alibaba and Spark Venture. This latest funding round has brought their total capital raised to an impressive $35 million. The company's main goal with this funding is to expand its StableX Network on a global scale.

data.title: Bitcoin's 'ultra-precise' macro signal hints at $100K target. US and China yields crossover as whales buy, pointing to a possible price bottom. 6-figure move expected soon.
data.description: A recent market trend has shown that the yield rates of the United States and China are converging, coupled with large purchases from significant investors, indicating that Bitcoin might be reaching a potential price floor. This development is signaling the possibility of Bitcoin making a significant upward move towards reaching a six-figure value in the upcoming months.

data.title: DPC Dash Ltd (1405.HK) to Announce Full Year 2025 Financial Results on March 25, 2026
data.description: On March 13, 2026, in Hong Kong, DPC Dash Ltd announced being Domino's Pizza China's exclusive master franchisee in China Mainland, Hong Kong, and Macau. Traded as 1405.HK, DPC Dash holds the rights for these regions for Domino's Pizza.

data.title: Nidec Announces the Establishment of the Executive Responsibility Investigation Committee
data.description: KYOTO, Japan - A recent announcement detailed the consideration and subsequent establishment of an Executive Responsibility Investigation Committee following the “Announcement Regarding the Disclosure of the Third-Party Committee’s Investigation Report and Our Company’s Response” on March 3, 2026. During meetings held on March 13, 2026, the Board of Directors and Audit and Supervisory Committee approved the formation of the Committee. This decision marks a significant development in addressing accountability within the company and ensuring transparency in its operations.

data.title: INJ Price may hit $3.44 by April, as indicators show neutral recovery. Currently trades at $3.11 with RSI at 48.65.
data.description: The current trading price of Injective (INJ) stands at $3.11 with a neutral RSI of 48.65. Based on technical analysis, there is a possibility of a rally towards the $3.44-$3.60 range within the next 30 days if key resistance levels are reclaimed by the bulls.

data.title: Experian and OpenAI Launch the UK’s First Credit Score App Inside ChatGPT
data.description: Experian, a leading data and technology company, revealed the debut of the UK's inaugural credit score app on ChatGPT apps. This innovative tool includes a novel postcode-based credit score comparison feature, incorporating Experian's reliable data into one of the most popular AI platforms globally. By utilizing aggregated and anonymized data from Experian Credit Score, which is highly respected in the UK, the app showcases comparisons of average scores among different postcode areas and age demographics. This provides users with valuable insights into credit scoring trends across various regions and age groups.
